allow: Bash(python -c "import json; p=json.load\(open\('data/prospects_2026.json'\)\); print\(f'Total: {len\(p\)}'\); print\(f'Sources seen:'\); from collections import Counter; srcs=Counter\(x.get\('forty_source'\) or 'none' for x in p\); print\(srcs\); print\('First 5 names:'\); [print\(f\\"  #{x.get\('rank'\)} {x.get\('name'\)} \({x.get\('pos'\)}\) {x.get\('school'\)}\\"\) for x in p[:5]]")

Bash(python -c "import json; p=json.load\(open\('data/prospects_rated.json'\)\); print\(f'Total rated: {len\(p\)}'\); real=[x for x in p if x.get\('nfl_comp'\) or \(x.get\('notes'\) and len\(x.get\('notes',''\)\)>50\)]; print\(f'With NFL comp or notes: {len\(real\)}'\); fillers=[x for x in p if not x.get\('notes'\) and not x.get\('nfl_comp'\) and not x.get\('forty_source'\)]; print\(f'Fillers \(no metadata\): {len\(fillers\)}'\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; r=json.load\(open\('data/reference_draft_class.json'\)\); print\(f'Reference class: {len\(r\)} prospects'\); keys=list\(r.keys\(\)\)[:10]; [print\(f'  {k} -> {r[k].get\(\\"pos\\"\)} OVR={r[k].get\(\\"overall\\"\)}'\) for k in keys]")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('data/prospects_2026.json'\)\); print\('count:', len\(d\)\); from collections import Counter; print\('rank range:', min\(p['rank'] for p in d if p.get\('rank'\)\), '-', max\(p['rank'] for p in d if p.get\('rank'\)\)\); print\('positions:', Counter\(p['pos'] for p in d\)\)")
